Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v0.6 agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.6.zip --title ''v0.6'' --notes ''## Changes:*)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v0.7 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.7.zip'' --title ''v0.7'' --notes ''Creature-type-based blood colors with settings dialog. Undead, constructs, aberrations, plants, oozes, celestials/fey, fiends, and dragons each have distinct default colors. Elementals suppress blood effects but keep desaturation. A new GM settings dialog lets colors be customized per type. Adds a Custom creature type path field for unsupported systems. Also: blood pool now takes ~16s to fully spread, fade-out timer starts only after full spread, and pool color darkens over its lifetime.''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v0.8 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.8.zip'' --title ''v0.8 \(testing\)'' --notes ''Testing release. Adds creature-type-based blood colors with settings dialog, elemental blood suppression, partial type string matching for parenthetical types, and a continuous damage red tint via the TMFX adjustment filter alongside desaturation.''")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release upload v0.8 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.8.zip'' --clobber")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v0.9 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v0.9.zip'' --title ''v0.9'' --notes ''Damage tint now derives from the creature blood color rather than hardcoded red. The dominant color channel is boosted to 1.8 at 0 HP while absent channels fall to 0.3, giving each creature type a visually distinct tint. Elementals receive desaturation only with no tint applied.''")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v1.1 ''agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.1.zip'' --title ''v1.1'' --notes ''Adds blood path trails: a new Enable Blood Path Trails setting places randomised drips and directional smears in each grid square a bloodied token crosses during movement. Smears are oriented to the travel direction and the system respects ruler waypoints for multi-segment paths. Marks share the existing trail lifetime and spacing settings. Also changes the undead default blood color to medium gray.''")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v1.22 ''c:\\Users\\djsco\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\agnostic-token-damage-effects\\agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.22.zip'' --title ''v1.22'' --notes ''Blood path trails now drop marks continuously along the actual movement path in real time, with smears oriented to the direction of travel.'' --repo nscarpinatodev/agnostic-token-damage-effects")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v1.23 ''c:\\Users\\djsco\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\agnostic-token-damage-effects\\agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.23.zip'' --title ''v1.23'' --notes ''Rewrite blood path trails: marks now placed at evenly-spaced intervals along the actual movement path, with smears oriented to direction of travel. Correctly handles multi-segment paths with ruler waypoints.'' --repo nscarpinatodev/agnostic-token-damage-effects")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v1.29 ''c:\\Users\\djsco\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\agnostic-token-damage-effects\\agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.29.zip'' --title ''v1.29'' --notes ''Debug build: switch to tokenDoc.movementHistory for authoritative waypoint data.'' --repo nscarpinatodev/agnostic-token-damage-effects")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v1.31 ''c:\\Users\\djsco\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\agnostic-token-damage-effects\\agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.31.zip'' --title ''v1.31'' --notes ''Blood path trail marks now appear after the token finishes moving to each waypoint/endpoint. Also removes debug logging.'' --repo nscarpinatodev/agnostic-token-damage-effects")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v1.32 ''c:\\Users\\djsco\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\agnostic-token-damage-effects\\agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.32.zip'' --title ''v1.32'' --notes ''Fix permission errors shown to non-GM players when settings are changed. Token alpha updates are now skipped for users who lack modify permission on a given token.'' --repo nscarpinatodev/agnostic-token-damage-effects")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe'' release create v1.33 ''c:\\Users\\djsco\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\agnostic-token-damage-effects\\agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.33.zip'' --title ''v1.33'' --notes ''Fix server-side permission errors for non-GM players. Token Magic FX filters are now applied locally for players who do not own a token, avoiding the document write that was being rejected server-side.'' --repo nscarpinatodev/agnostic-token-damage-effects")
Bash("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" release view v1.39)
Bash(powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path module.json, scripts, styles, templates -DestinationPath agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.49.zip -Force")
Bash(zip -r agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.51.zip scripts styles templates module.json -x "*.DS_Store")

PowerShell(Remove-Item -Force "agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.51.zip" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Compress-Archive -Path scripts, styles, templates, module.json -DestinationPath "agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.51.zip" -CompressionLevel Optimal; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\(\(Resolve-Path "agnostic-token-damage-effects-v1.51.zip"\)\); $z.Entries | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; $z.Dispose\(\))
